title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at iDiscoveri Education - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at iDiscoveri Education - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
iDiscoveri Education invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About iDiscoveri Education:
iDiscoveri Education is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iDiscoveri Education!
